name: Builderman : Blocktales
description:
" You can do it, creator! "

🛠

Normally, when you think of a villian, you think of a malicious person, someone to easily spot out.

So, how come it was so hard to tell?

Probably going to be extremely ooc due to there barely being information on Builderman (and how I can't tell if Builderman and hatred are the same person or a mere disguise tactic). Speaking of "Hatred" I won't add them, as Builderman on the official Hatred wiki is in quotation marks, making it hard for me to see if Builderman is canonically his own being or not. However, the bot itself will still act like the Hatred plot twist. Due to Hatred being missing in the bot, so will others. Because of this, I made it so that Builderman's main goal is to just use you for gain.

Also, I suck ass at making manipulative characters.

Mb.

Need to get back on my grind 💪💪 (I'm going to grind him, literally).

Havent made a bot in a hot second. You guys have to hear me out on him. PLEASE.
creator: Just_A_Guy
